betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Euphemium§f

§aOne of the most powerful endgame materials — produced from schrabidium clusters bathed in balefire!§f

§bEuphemium§f is a fictional exotic matter that serves as one of the mod's most powerful endgame materials. It is extremely expensive to produce in large amounts. It has ingot, nugget, powder, and block forms.

§6Production: Balefire Method§f
§b1.§f Craft multiple §bSchrabidium Clusters§f (requires starmetal, schrabidium, and ferric schrabidate)
§b2.§f Obtain any §bBalefire-type bomb§f — a dud works easiest (small footprint, no fueling)
§b3.§f Place schrabidium clusters around the bomb, similar to how you initially made schrabidium
§b4.§f Detonate the bomb — clusters with balefire on top transmute into §bEuphemium-Etched Schrabidium Clusters§f
§b5.§f Centrifuge the etched clusters → §bEuphemium Nuggets§f

§6Production: Exposure Chamber§f
Expose §bPlutonium§f (Box of Plutonium Dust) to §bDark Matter Capsule§f in the Exposure Chamber → §bEuphemium Ingot§f
Recipe: Box of Plutonium Dust + Dark Matter Capsule → Euphemium Ingot

§6Properties§f:
§b• Extremely high durability, nearly indestructible when compounded with astatine and osmiridium
§b• Creates and stabilizes singularities
§b• Causes temporary paralysis on hit
§b• Almost completely inert nature
§b• Reverse gravity well

§6Uses§f:
§b• Cannot be stamped into plates — must be forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f into §bEuphemium Compound Plates§f
  Recipe: Euphemium Ingot×4 + Astatine Powder×3 + Bismuth Powder + Volcanic Gem + Osmiridium Ingot
§b• Euphemium Armor — best protection in the game
§b• Custom nuke — contributes 1 to anti-mass stage (nuggets preferred over ingots)
§b• Rod of Discord — crafted with Book of Boxcars
§b• Artificial Xen Crystal
§b• Spark blend crafting

§cWarning§f: Euphemium production requires balefire, which is extremely dangerous. Ensure your base is far away from the detonation site! The dud method is safest but duds are rare.

§eTip§f: Use the dud method for initial euphemium. Once you have a small amount, set up the Exposure Chamber with Dark Matter for automated production. Never use ingots in custom nukes when nuggets work — nuggets are more efficient per unit of euphemium!
